name: @platform/authorisation-runtime
description: Authorisation port interfaces: resource access decisions (UMA), realm admin operations, and resource policy management. Zero @platform dependencies ? leaf port node.

readme.summary: Authorisation port interfaces for resource access (UMA/PEP pattern) and realm administration. Zero @platform dependencies ? this is a leaf port node.
responsibilities: Define AuthorisationPort for UMA-based per-resource access decisions
Define RealmAdminPort for tenant realm configuration (IdP, MFA, session, policies)
Define all associated types: Resource, AccessDecision, IdentityProvider, MfaPolicy, SessionPolicy, ResourcePolicy
nonResponsibilities: Does not implement UMA ticket evaluation (owned by adapters-keycloak)
Does not implement Keycloak Admin REST API calls (owned by adapters-keycloak)
Does not hold any Keycloak credentials
usage: Imported by platform-api to type-check the forward auth endpoint and auth settings API
adapters-keycloak implements both AuthorisationPort and RealmAdminPort
operationalNotes: Zero @platform/* dependencies required ? this package must remain a leaf node to avoid import boundary violations
